titles.en: Chapter on the Time When Marriage is Disliked

text: 4388 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "مَنْ تَزَوَّجَ وَ اَلْقَمَرُ فِي اَلْعَقْرَبِ لَمْ يَرَ اَلْحُسْنَى".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4388 - Muhammad ibn Humran narrated from his father, who reported from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said: "Whoever marries when the moon is in a harmful or unfavorable position will not see good outcomes."

text: 4389 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّهُ يُكْرَهُ اَلتَّزْوِيجُ فِي مُحَاقِ اَلشَّهْرِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4389 - It is narrated that "It is disliked to marry during the waning phase of the moon."
